prompt: Please handle everything for this deployment while I step away.
Just automate the whole onboarding pipeline end to end.
Run everything in parallel so the tests finish faster.
이 배포 작업 전부 해줘, 순서는 알아서 맞춰도 돼.
테스트들 병렬 실행해줘, 시간 없어.
이 마이그레이션 자동으로 처리해줘.
Kick off ultrawork on this refactor, I want the full gate loop.
Let's do ulw for this feature since it touches multiple modules.
Start ultrawork mode to review and fix everything end to end.
이 리팩토링 ultrawork로 끝까지 해줘.
로그인 버그 ulw로 전부 고쳐줘.
이번 기능 ultrawork 모드로 진행해줘.
We need an architecture review before splitting this into microservices.
Let's do a tradeoff analysis for the module boundary between billing and orders.
Write the ADR for this new service boundary decision.
이 프로젝트 아키텍처 리뷰 좀 해줘.
결제랑 주문 서비스 모듈 경계를 정리해줘.
이 설계는 트레이드오프 분석이 필요해 보여.
Make a plan for migrating the auth service to the new provider.
Break down this feature into a task breakdown before we start building.
Please analyze requirements for the new billing dashboard first.
이번 마이그레이션 계획 세워줘.
이 기능 요구사항 정리해줘, 개발 들어가기 전에.
새 대시보드 작업 분해 좀 해줘.
Review my code before I open the PR.
Please run a security audit on the payment module.
Check my code for the new caching layer, something feels off.
이 PR 리뷰해줘.
결제 모듈 보안 감사 좀 해줘.
이 코드 한번 봐줘, 이상한 부분 있는지.
Run deepsec on this repo before we merge.
Kick off a deepsec pr review for this branch.
We should scan repo with deepsec after the dependency bump.
이 레포 딥섹 스캔 돌려줘.
이 브랜치 딥섹 PR 리뷰 해줘.
머지 전에 딥섹 실행해줘.
The login page is broken after the last deploy, please debug this.
Please fix the crash happening on checkout.
Find the bug causing duplicate emails to send.
로그인 화면이 배포 후에 깨졌어, 고쳐줘.
체크아웃에서 계속 에러나, 버그 좀 찾아줘.
이 API 호출이 자꾸 안 돼, 원인 좀 봐줘.
Let's brainstorm a few ideas for the onboarding redesign.
Help me ideate on notification strategies for churned users.
What if we explored a completely different pricing model?
note: probe: 'what if' is also an informationalPatterns entry, so this may be self-suppressed even though it is a genuine brainstorm request

prompt: 새 온보딩 화면 아이디어 좀 줘봐.
알림 전략 관련해서 같이 생각해보자.
가격 모델을 완전히 다르게 하면 어떻게 하면 좋을까 구상해보자.
note: probe: '어떻게 하면 좋을까' contains '하면 좋을', also an informationalPatterns.ko entry — may self-suppress

prompt: Walk me through fixing this migration one step at a time.
Let's do this step by step, guide me through each change.
Switch to manual mode and go one by one through these files.
이 작업 단계별로 진행해줘.
파일들 하나씩 해줘, 한번에 말고.
차근차근 해줘, 급하지 않아.
Let's bootstrap a new project for the internal admin tool.
Please setup project scaffolding for the mobile app repo.
Initialize this repo with our standard harness before we start coding.
새 프로젝트 셋업해줘.
이 레포 프로젝트 초기화해줘.
관리자 도구용 새 프로젝트 만들어줘.
Help me resolve this merge conflict on the release branch.
I need to rebase my branch onto main before opening the PR.
Let's set up a worktree for the hotfix branch.
이거 커밋해줘, 메시지는 컨벤셔널로.
머지 충돌 해결 좀 도와줘.
이 브랜치 리베이스해줘.
Keep going until this migration is fully done, don't stop halfway.
Run this to completion, see it through even if a test fails once.
Finish everything on this ticket before you stop.
이 작업 끝까지 해줘, 멈추지마.
테스트 다 통과할때까지 계속해줘.
랄프로 이 리팩토링 끝장내줘.
Design a landing page for the new product launch.
Let's pick a color palette and typography for the dashboard redesign.
Build a wireframe for the onboarding flow before we code it.
이 제품 런칭용 랜딩페이지 디자인해줘.
대시보드 색상 팔레트 정해줘.
온보딩 화면 UI 디자인 좀 만들어줘.
Verify docs against the current API before we ship this release.
Our documentation is stale, let's sync docs with the latest schema changes.
Check docs for any broken links after the restructuring.
릴리즈 전에 문서 검증해줘.
이 API 변경 반영해서 문서 동기화해줘.
오래된 문서 있는지 점검해줘.
Give me a recap of everything I worked on today.
Do a quick recap of this week's PRs before standup.
I want a recap of yesterday's debugging session.
오늘 작업 리캡 좀 해줘.
이번 주 PR들 리캡해줘.
어제 진행한 디버깅 작업 리캡해줘.
Make a video walking through this feature for the release notes.
Turn this into a video for the marketing team.
Create a demo video showing the new checkout flow.
이 기능 설명 영상 만들어줘.
새 결제 플로우 데모 영상 좀 만들어줘.
이 README를 영상으로 만들어줘.
What does the ultrawork workflow do exactly?
note: informational question about the workflow, not a run request

prompt: How does ralph decide when to stop?
note: informational question about ralph's design

prompt: Why is ultrawork triggering here again?
note: meta-discussion about a false trigger, not a request

prompt: 랄프랑 울트라워크 차이가 뭐야?
note: comparison question between two workflows

prompt: 왜 자꾸 랄프가 트리거되는거야?
note: meta-discussion about why ralph keeps firing

prompt: Is there anything worth comparing between orchestrate and ultrawork?
note: analytical comparison question

prompt: I read the ralph.md file to understand the workflow.
note: artifact reference (file name), not a run request

prompt: Use oma ralph:verify to check state after the merge.
note: CLI subcommand artifact reference

prompt: .agents/workflows/ralph 파일 구조를 바꾸자.
note: path-segment artifact reference

prompt: Check ralph.exec-tier before editing checkpoints.
note: property/config artifact reference

prompt: The user quoted `ultrawork` inline in the ticket description.
note: inline code / quoted mention should be stripped before matching

prompt:
```
orchestrate
```
that's just leftover text in the ticket.
note: fenced code block should be stripped before matching

prompt: 티켓에 `디버그`라는 단어가 그대로 있었어.
note: inline code / quoted mention should be stripped before matching

prompt: What is the review workflow supposed to check for?
note: informational question, 'what is' pattern near the keyword

prompt: What is the deepsec workflow supposed to scan?
note: informational question, 'what is' pattern near the keyword

prompt: 딥섹 워크플로우가 정확히 뭘 하는지 설명해줘.
note: informational request ('설명해') near the keyword

prompt: The debug logs show a timeout in the payment service.
note: false-fire probe: 'debug' used as a noun in 'debug logs', not a request to the agent

prompt: I fixed the merge conflict issue we discussed yesterday.
note: false-fire probe: past-tense narrative containing 'merge conflict'

prompt: The new intern is working through onboarding steps one by one.
note: false-fire probe: 'one by one' used descriptively, not as a request

prompt: 그건 어제 이미 커밋했어.
note: false-fire probe: past-tense narrative containing bare '커밋'

prompt: This PR review took longer than expected due to flaky CI.
note: false-fire probe: past-tense narrative containing 'review'

prompt: 그 디자인 시안은 어제 이미 확정됐어.
note: false-fire probe: past-tense narrative containing bare '디자인'

prompt: oma agent:spawn brainstorm for the new landing page
note: CLI invocation guard: bare oma CLI form should suppress all workflows

prompt: codex exec --workflow ralph now
note: CLI invocation guard: host-CLI verb form should suppress all workflows

prompt: /oma:brainstorm please
note: slash-command guard: leading slash is treated as a native slash command, not keyword detection

prompt: /debug something is broken
note: slash-command guard: leading slash short-circuits keyword detection entirely

prompt: /review 이 코드 봐줘
note: slash-command guard: leading slash short-circuits keyword detection entirely

prompt: She said "let's brainstorm this later" but we're not ready yet.
note: quoted-string mention should be stripped before matching

prompt: 그는 "단계별로 해줘"라고 말했지만 아직 결정된 건 아니야.
note: quoted-string mention should be stripped before matching

prompt: What's the weather like today?
Can you explain how JWT works?
Thanks, that looks great!
Let's grab lunch after this call.
How do I install bun on macOS?
What's the capital of France?
I appreciate your help with this.
Please summarize this article for me.
Convert this CSV to a JSON array.
What's your favorite programming language?
Can you translate this sentence to Spanish?
Tell me a joke about databases.
What time zone are you in?
I'm heading out for the day, see you tomorrow.
Explain the difference between var, let, and const.
How many days are in February this year?
Add a comment explaining this function.
What does HTTP status 429 mean?
Rename this variable to something clearer.
Print the current date in ISO format.
What's a good name for this new microservice?
Can you double check this regex is correct?
I think we should upgrade Node to the LTS version.
This test is flaky, any idea why offhand?
오늘 날씨 어때?
점심 뭐 먹을까?
고마워, 도움 많이 됐어.
JWT가 정확히 뭔지 설명해줘.
이 변수 이름 좀 더 명확하게 바꿔줘.
파이썬이랑 자바 중에 뭐가 더 배우기 쉬워?
이 함수에 주석 좀 달아줘.
지금 몇 시야?
이 CSV를 JSON으로 변환해줘.
오늘 할 일 없으면 좀 쉬어도 될까?
이 문장 영어로 번역해줘.
너 좋아하는 프로그래밍 언어 있어?
HTTP 429 상태코드가 무슨 뜻이야?
내일 회의 몇 시에 시작해?
이 라이브러리 버전 좀 확인해줘.
지금 날짜 ISO 포맷으로 출력해줘.
그 워크플로우 자체는 어떻게 동작해?
그 랄프 코드를 한번 깊게 봐볼래?
note: meta-discussion about ralph; must stay suppressed by '깊게 봐'/'코드를 한번' after '한번 봐' removal

prompt: What if the detector fires twice?
note: specificity-round hard negative: meta question about the detector itself, using the same 'what if' phrasing brainstorm now relies on — must stay suppressed via the 'detector' informationalPattern even though 'what if' was removed from informationalPatterns.*

prompt: 그 리뷰 워크플로우 자체가 뭐야?
note: meta question about the review workflow itself ('그 ... 워크플로우 자체'), not a request to run review

prompt: 이 워크플로우가 어떻게 동작하는지 설명해줘.
note: narrowed informationalPatterns.ko regression check: bare '어떻게' was replaced with specific forms ('어떻게 동작', '어떻게 하는지', ...) after it collided with brainstorm's own '어떻게 하면 좋을까' keyword — this genuine 'how does it work' meta-question must still be suppressed by '어떻게 동작'

prompt: What is the deepsec pr review workflow for, out of curiosity? Separately and unrelated to that question, please review this PR today.
note: specificity-ranking policy check: the more specific 'deepsec pr review' match is suppressed (informational window around 'what is'), but a separate, unsuppressed 'review this' request later in the same prompt is NOT suppressed — a suppressed specific candidate must not block a different, genuine generic request from firing
